failure_reason: Moved the runtime grammar capsule and selector layer into a form.action section in engine.fk and added dynamic selector bindings for file extension and section block usage. The selector registry resolves .py and .svg by extension, python.bmf and go.bmf by section dialect, and proves .rs is unavailable until the Rust binding is added at runtime.
